text_preview: OCT 21st, 1984. Time: 20:35. Duration: not determined. A military working at the Control Tower at Gioânia Airport reported to CINDACTA that the VASP pilot on flight VP 253 had informed that at 20:22, when he was making a final approach to land in Goiânia, he observed “a strong white light”. According to the operator, he himself saw the same strong white light with the use of binoculars and also with the naked eye. At that the unidentified flying object was about 10NM [nautical miles] from Goiânia Airport. The operator also stated that the light was “continuous, with a few flashes and that it l
summary: On Oct 21, 1984, a VASP pilot on final approach and a military control tower operator both observed a strong white light with intermittent flashes about 10 NM from Goiânia Airport; no radar contact was made.
